ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transportation_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transportation request */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client who submitted the request */,
  "origin_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the origin location */,
  "destination_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the destination location */,
  "earliest_pickup_time" TEXT /* Earliest time the pickup can occur */,
  "latest_pickup_time" TEXT /* Latest time the pickup can occur */,
  "earliest_destination_time" TEXT /* Earliest time the delivery can occur at the destination */,
  "latest_destination_time" TEXT /* Latest time the delivery can occur at the destination */,
  "distance_to_destination" INTEGER /* Estimated distance to the destination in time units */,
  "cost_of_request" REAL /* Estimated cost of fulfilling the request */,
  "load" TEXT /* Load type or size */,
  "request_status" TEXT /* Current status of the request */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the request */,
  "special_instructions" TEXT /* Special instructions or requirements */,
  "estimated_delivery_time" TEXT /* Estimated delivery time */,
  "actual_delivery_time" TEXT /* Actual delivery time */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assigned vehicle */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assigned driver */,
  "load_type" TEXT /* Type of load */,
  "load_weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the load */,
  "load_volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the load */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transportation_requests_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transportation_requests_destination_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transportation_requests_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transportation_requests_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transportation_requests_origin_id FOREIGN KEY ("origin_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the location */,
  "operating_hours_start" TEXT /* Start time of operating hours */,
  "operating_hours_end" TEXT /* End time of operating hours */,
  "loading_dock_capacity" INTEGER /* Number of loading docks available */,
  "loading_dock_type" TEXT /* Type of loading docks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle */,
  "vehicle_make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the vehicle */,
  "availability_status" TEXT /* Current availability status of the vehicle */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used by the vehicle */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Maintenance status of the vehicle */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next maintenance */,
  "license_plate" TEXT /* License plate number of the vehicle */,
  "insurance_expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the vehicle's insurance */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver assigned to the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "client_type" TEXT /* Type of client (e.g., Retail, Manufacturing, E-commerce) */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Name of the driver */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the driver */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of driving experience */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the driver */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the driver */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "load_types" (
  "load_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each load type */,
  "load_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the load type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the load type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("load_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delivery_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transportation request */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., On-Time Delivery, Cost, Distance) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delivery_metrics_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES transportation_requests ("request_id")
)
